label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So the question is: Today is September 7th (9/7). Jane is watching NFL 2003. What is the date a month ago in MM/DD/YYYY? Hmm. So first, I need to subtract a month from September 7th, 2003. Let me think. If today is September 7, then a month ago would be August 7th, right? Because September is the 9th month, so subtracting one month would bring us to August, which is the 8th month. So the date would be 08/07/2003. Let me check the options. There is an option F which is 08/07/2003. So is that the correct answer? Wait, but sometimes months have different numbers of days. For example, if today was March 31st, then a month ago would be February 28th (or 29th in a leap year). However, in this case, September 7th minus one month is August 7th. Since August has 31 days, there's no problem
